An old map turned up in the archives that marks a cache nobody has found

A traveling scholar offered a small fortune for directions to a ruin that is not on any current map

A merchant's journal was found in the wall of a demolished building with entries about a hidden storehouse

A child found a pendant in the creek bed made of a metal that nobody in the settlement could identify
A landslide near the ridge exposed a sealed doorway carved into the rock, and nobody has opened it yet
A farmer plowing his field turned up a clay jar full of tarnished coins from an era no one recognizes
The old hermit who lived by the lake left behind a chest when he died, but no one can find the key
A hunter sheltering from rain in a cave found the back wall was bricked up with masonry too fine for a natural cave
A cartographer's widow is selling his papers, and one set of notes describes a vault he never filed publicly
The earthquake last year cracked the cellar floor of the tavern and the innkeeper swears he saw stonework below
A diver pulling weeds from the canal lock found a corroded strongbox wedged under the sluice gate
The demolition crew tearing down the old barracks found coins mortared into the walls, dozens of them
A woodcutter found a hollow tree stuffed with wrapped bundles: oilcloth, sealed with wax, heavy for their size

A shepherd found a worked-stone passage in the hillside after a section of turf collapsed under his flock
The river changed course after the spring floods and exposed a stone platform that was buried for who knows how long
A woman clearing her late father's attic found a leather tube with a hand-drawn map and notes in a language she can't read

An old well that dried up years ago has a side passage at the bottom that no one has explored because of the drop

The charcoal burner found a stone-lined pit in the forest that was too regular to be natural and too deep to see the bottom

The sappers digging the new foundation hit a layer of packed gravel that turned out to be a buried road surface
A retired soldier swears there's a sealed room behind the back wall of the old garrison that was never on any plan
